name: rochasistema
description: Sistema de Gestão de Reboques — Rocha Reboques

scripts.db:info: node -e "const {initDB,all}=require('./backend/database');initDB().then(()=>{console.log('Usuarios:',all('SELECT id,nome,login,nivel FROM usuarios'));console.log('Reboques:',all('SELECT id,nome,status FROM reboques').length,'registros');});"
